name: Dominion Valley Sports Pavilion
about: Dominion Valley Sports Pavilion is part of Dominion Valley Country Club, a full-service private club located in Haymarket, Virginia. The venue offers a comprehensive golf experience with two distinct courses, Dominion Valley Course and Regency Course, complemented by on-site amenities including the Sports Pavilion for fitness and a full-service restaurant, Palmer Table & Tap. It operates as a private club that also hosts events, making it a multi-faceted facility for members and guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive practice facility with a dedicated bay and covered teeing area
Dual-course access to both the Dominion Valley and Regency golf courses
On-site professional coaching and club fitting services available
Private events hosting for tournaments and outings

food_and_drink.notes: Palmer Table & Tap offers a restaurant with a full kitchen; menus vary by day with 'Sunday Best' and Member's Favorites
Full bar service available at Palmer Table & Tap

faq.question: Do I need clubs to use the facility?
faq.answer: The facility includes a practice area for golfers to practice with their own equipment. For lessons, clubs are provided by the professional staff.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not permitted. On-site dining is available at Palmer Table & Tap.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Please contact the club directly for 18-hole pace of play information, as it depends on the course and conditions.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Dominion Valley Country Club offers youth golf programs and lessons, but its general operations and amenities are geared towards adults.
